# Test mcp2go auto-detection of input types
#
# This test verifies that mcp2go correctly auto-detects input formats

# Test MCP tool auto-detection
-- calculator_tool.json --
{
  "name": "calculator",
  "description": "Basic calculator operations",
  "inputSchema": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "operation": {
        "type": "string",
        "enum": ["add", "subtract", "multiply", "divide"]
      },
      "a": {
        "type": "number"
      },
      "b": {
        "type": "number"
      }
    },
    "required": ["operation", "a", "b"]
  },
  "returnType": {
    "type": "object",
    "properties": {
      "result": {
        "type": "number"
      }
    }
  }
}

# Run without explicit type
exec go run .. calculator_tool.json
stdout 'Auto-detected input type: mcp'
stdout 'Generated: calculator_tool.go'

# Check the generated code
exec cat calculator_tool.go
stdout 'type CalculatorTool interface'
stdout 'Operation string `json:"operation"`'

# Test JSON schema auto-detection
-- config_schema.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "host": {
      "type": "string",
      "default": "localhost"
    },
    "port": {
      "type": "integer",
      "default": 8080
    }
  }
}

exec go run .. config_schema.json
stdout 'Auto-detected input type: jsonschema'
stdout 'Generated: configschema.go'

# Test $schema field detection
-- with_schema.json --
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "value": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  }
}

exec go run .. with_schema.json
stdout 'Auto-detected input type: jsonschema'
stdout 'Generated: withschema.go'

# Test ambiguous format (should fail to auto-detect)
-- ambiguous.json --
{
  "something": "value"
}

! exec go run .. ambiguous.json
stderr 'Could not auto-detect input type'
stderr 'Please specify with -type flag'
